name: test_e2e_detection[PLAIN_SHELLINJ_001]
description:

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| **Pattern ID** | `PLAIN_SHELLINJ_001` |
| **Description** | key=value format with shell injection + workspace escape |
| **Category** | WORKSPACE_ESCAPE |
| **Severity** | `HIGH` |

## Attack Details

## Test Execution Results
